title: Verify Remind Me toggle sends notification 24 hours before trial ends
description: Test that enabling the Remind Me option triggers appropriate notification scheduling
preconditions: Trial is active with at least 1 day remaining

steps.description: 2. Locate 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle in Manage Trial section
3. Toggle the Remind Me option to ON
4. Verify confirmation or visual feedback is shown

expected_result: Toggle changes to enabled state, and system schedules WhatsApp/Push notification for 24 hours before trial end
